description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a rounded, slightly tapered body and a smoothly curved handle. The front of the cup features a bold black and white graphic of two penguins, partially overlaid by a yellow text that appears to read 'RAE'. The cup's surface is glossy, reflecting light and giving it a clean, polished appearance. The handle is ergonomically shaped, allowing for a comfortable grip. The interior is plain white, matching the exterior base color. The cup is of moderate size, suitable for serving hot beverages such as coffee or tea.
description: A glossy white ceramic cup with a rounded body, ergonomic handle, and a black-and-white penguin graphic with yellow text on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the penguin graphic and yellow text, with the handle visible on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view focused on the handle, with the graphic not visible.
description_view_2: Side view showing the plain white surface and the handle on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain white surface, no handle or graphic visible.
